forbidden_scope: Harbor runtime session binding or execution
generated TypeScript types, Ajv integration, or OpenAPI
FR #95 closeout before remaining #95 Work Items and cross-repo dependencies are resolved

integration_evidence.summary: Parses Task Intent v0, rejects invalid/private input before admission, enforces read-only policy, and creates accepted/admitted Run Records through the file-backed store.
Exports the read-only task submission helper and related task intent/submission types.
Validates accepted read-only task submission and invalid private-field rejection without adding a test framework.
Maps GH-101 as the primary Work Item and GH-95 as parent FR evidence without claiming FR completion.

suite_path_consumption.rationale: Narrow Core runtime PR with the first accepted admission recording path on top of existing schema fixtures and local Run Record storage, with no API route, runtime execution, generated consumers, database, hosted service, or cross-repo integration.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR Ready consume the core runtime helper, self-check output, GH-101 carrier, local build/typecheck/test/lint/conformance output, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to broader suite artifacts when API submit/query behavior, runtime lifecycle execution, Lode package/capability consumption, Harbor runtime binding, result projection, evidence retrieval, generated types, CLI/MCP/SDK/App-facing API, database storage, hosted service storage, or true-write guardrails are added.
